name: harness-rails
description: Operational safety rails for long-running operations: pre-flight resource calc (working set vs RAM ceiling), memory scan (surface relevant past lessons by operation keyword), in-flight anomaly detection (heartbeat + cron watcher) with Discord + gh issue auto-emit. Built after a 23h sunk-cost incident where philosophy-level early-bleeding-detection failed because it lived only in memory, not in structural rails.
